description: ⚠️ WRITE OPERATION - Confirm with user before calling. Creates a new External Secrets Manager instance within your Fivetran account.

type.description: The ESM provider type. Supported values: AWS_SECRET_MANAGER, AZURE_KEY_VAULT, HASHICORP_VAULT.

name.description: The name of the External Secrets Manager instance. Must be unique within the account.

config.description: Provider-specific configuration object. For AWS_SECRET_MANAGER: role_arn (required). For AZURE_KEY_VAULT: vault_url (required), tenant_id (required for SaaS). For HASHICORP_VAULT: vault_address (required), role_id and secret_id (required for SaaS), namespace (optional).

is_hybrid_deployment.description: Whether this External Secrets Manager instance is compatible with Hybrid Deployment environments.

id.description: The unique identifier of the External Secrets Manager instance.

name.description: The name of the ESM instance

is_hybrid_deployment.description: Whether this External Secrets Manager instance is compatible with Hybrid Deployment environments.

created_at.description: The timestamp when the ESM instance was created.

updated_at.description: The timestamp when the ESM instance was last updated.
